inline_visual.description: NHFWA accrual tiers — 56 hrs/yr at 20+ employees, 40 hrs/yr at 11-19 employees, 40 hrs/yr unpaid under 11 employees. Caption: 'NHFWA accrual tiers — same rate, different caps'.

sources.title: Nebraska Department of Labor — Paid Sick Time / NHFWA FAQs
data_extracted: Accrual rate: 1 hour per 30 hours worked
Accrual start: after 80 hours of employment
Annual accrual cap: 56 hours (20+ employees) or 40 hours (11-19 employees)
Unpaid entitlement for employers under 11 employees
Mandatory carryover to next year within cap
Pay rate: employee regular rate at time of use

sources.title: Nebraska Legislature — LB 415 (2025) amendment to Initiative 436
data_extracted: Two-tier accrual cap: 56 hours (20+ employees), 40 hours (11-19 employees)
Unpaid floor for employers under 11 employees

sources.title: U.S. Department of Labor — FMLA
data_extracted: 12 weeks per year (26 weeks military caregiver)

sources.title: U.S. EEOC — Pregnant Workers Fairness Act
data_extracted: Reasonable accommodations for pregnancy, childbirth, related conditions

flags.detail: ROW cache stated '80+ employees: 56 hrs, 20-79: 40 hrs, <20: 40 hrs unpaid'. Nebraska compliance cache (nebraska.json) and LB 415 text use '20+ employees: 56 hrs, 11-19: 40 hrs, under 11: unpaid'. Page uses the compliance cache (20+/11-19) as verified source. The '80+' figure in the ROW description appears to be an error in the brief — verify against NDOL published FAQs before production.

LB 415 (2025) implementation details sourced from compliance cache and NDOL FAQ cross-reference. Exact enrolled bill text should be verified against Nebraska Legislature records at nebraskalegislature.gov before production publish.

compliance_notes.pullquote_provenance: MI MCP not queried (per sprint pattern). Pullquote anonymised to 'Teamed Legal Operations' with no named individual and no cite line. Tom Price-Daniel tagline-close stays as brand voice (exempt from MI provenance per pullquote rule).
compliance_notes.secondary_cta_destinations: Both secondary CTAs link to real Teamed tool destinations: masthead secondary points to Employer Cost Calculator, tagline-close secondary points to Crossover Calculator.
compliance_notes.no_state_pfml: Nebraska has no state PFML fund. No premium deduction or state fund remittance discussed. This is correctly handled as a zero-premium state.
compliance_notes.prompt_tier_discrepancy: ROW brief stated '80+ employees: 56 hrs'. Nebraska compliance cache states '20+ employees: 56 hrs'. Page uses 20+ (compliance cache) as the verified figure. Flag raised for production review.
compliance_notes.customer_strip_inside_container: Customer-strip section is inside the .container div as required by spec.
